docket_entries.description: COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF DICK, JOSEPH
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $250.00) SERVED NOV-20-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WICKLOW MANAGEMENT
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT WICKLOW MANAGEMENT
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT WICKLOW MANAGEMENT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DICK, JOSEPH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WICKLOW MANAGEMENT $60.00 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $235.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF: $60 FOR REIMBURSEMENT OF CLEANING FEE PLUS COSTS. LANDLORD DID NOT CARRY ITS BURDEN OF PROOF AS TO CLEANING BUT DID PROVIDE EVIDENCE THAT CARPET CLEANING WAS NECESSARY TO RESTORE CARPET TO THE STATE AT THE BEGINNING OF TENANCY. TENANT DID NOT CARRY HIS BURDEN OF PROOF AS TO AGREEMENT TO REFUND BALANCE OF NOVEMBER RENT. COST REDUCED TO REFLECT EXCESSIVE SERVICE COSTS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-28-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-28-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY TEVAITE O'NEILL, OFFICE MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DICK, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT WICKLOW MANAGEMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-28-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-28-2018 - JUDGMENT.
TRIAL EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT AT COUNTER.
